requirement_topic.en: NCA Mandatory Type Approval — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: NCA强制型式认可——无线电/电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: NCA強制型式認可——無線電/電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Ghanaian market must hold a valid NCA type approval certificate issued by the National Communications Authority under the Electronic Communications Act 2008 (Act 775). The NCA approval certificate number and label must appear on the product or its packaging before import or sale. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT devices with radio functionality are all in scope. NCA operates a Device Registration Portal for online application; batch type approval is available. CE and FCC marks are not recognised by NCA as equivalent.
summary.zh: 所有投放加纳市场的无线电及电信终端设备，须持有依据《2008年电子通信法》（第775号法案）由国家通信管理局（NCA）颁发的有效型式认可证书。产品或其包装上须在进口或销售前显示NCA认可证书编号及标签。Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及具有无线电功能的物联网设备均在适用范围内。NCA开设设备注册门户网站供在线申请；批量型式认可方式可供使用。NCA不承认CE和FCC标志作为等效认可。
summary.zht: 所有投放加納市場的無線電及電信終端設備，須持有依據《2008年電子通訊法》（第775號法案）由國家通訊管理局（NCA）頒發的有效型式認可證書。產品或其包裝上須在進口或銷售前顯示NCA認可證書編號及標籤。Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及具有無線電功能的物聯網裝置均在適用範圍內。NCA開設裝置註冊入口網站供線上申請；批量型式認可方式可供使用。NCA不承認CE和FCC標誌作為等效認可。

standards_or_laws: NCA Type Approval Certificate (product label + certificate number required)

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices typically hold SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval from MIIT (CMIIT ID), a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment, and CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for RF-emitting components in scope under GB standards. These Chinese-domestic approvals have no mutual recognition with Ghana NCA.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备通常持有工业和信息化部（MIIT）颁发的SRRC无线电型式核准（CMIIT ID）、电信终端设备的MIIT网络接入许可（NAL），以及适用GB标准范围内射频发射组件的CCC（中国强制认证）。上述中国境内认可与加纳NCA之间不存在相互承认协议。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備通常持有工業和資訊化部（MIIT）頒發的SRRC無線電型式核准（CMIIT ID）、電信終端設備的MIIT網路接入許可（NAL），以及適用GB標準範圍內射頻發射組件的CCC（中國強制認證）。上述中國境內認可與加納NCA之間不存在相互承認協議。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (CMIIT ID)
MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment

gap.en: Full gap: Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by NCA Ghana. A separate NCA type approval application must be filed via the NCA Device Registration Portal through a local Ghanaian company. The NCA approval label and certificate number must appear on all units before import or sale. No ECOWAS mutual recognition arrangement currently bridges this requirement for wireless devices.
gap.zh: 完全差距：中国的SRRC、NAL及CCC认可均不被加纳NCA承认。须通过当地加纳公司经由NCA设备注册门户网站单独提交NCA型式认可申请。进口或销售前，所有产品须显示NCA认可标签及证书编号。目前不存在可弥补无线设备领域要求差距的ECOWAS相互承认安排。
gap.zht: 完全差距：中國的SRRC、NAL及CCC認可均不被加納NCA承認。須透過當地加納公司經由NCA裝置註冊入口網站單獨提交NCA型式認可申請。進口或銷售前，所有產品須顯示NCA認可標籤及證書編號。目前不存在可彌補無線設備領域要求差距的ECOWAS相互承認安排。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals do not satisfy Ghana NCA type approval requirements. A separate NCA type approval must be obtained via a local Ghanaian company before placing wireless or telecom terminal equipment on the Ghanaian market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC、NAL及CCC认可不满足加纳NCA型式认可要求。在将无线或电信终端设备投放加纳市场前，须通过当地加纳公司单独取得NCA型式认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC、NAL及CCC認可不滿足加納NCA型式認可要求。在將無線或電信終端設備投放加納市場前，須透過當地加納公司單獨取得NCA型式認可。
